hero.description: Captivating live performances and studio sessions that create unforgettable sonic experiences.

cards.title: Live Performance
cards.subtitle: Events & Venues
cards.price: Bring your event to life with a tailored live performance. From intimate gatherings to large-scale events, every show is crafted to match the moment.

cards.title: Studio Sessions
cards.subtitle: Recording & Production
cards.price: Professional session work and production services. Whether you need a featured performance or a full arrangement, I bring musicality and precision to every track.

cards.title: Teaching & Workshops
cards.subtitle: Music Education
cards.price: Personalized lessons and group workshops for all skill levels. Learn technique, theory, and the art of musical expression from an experienced performer.

about.title: About Me
about.description: Music has been my language for over two decades. From smoky jazz clubs to grand concert halls, I've dedicated my life to the craft of sound. Every performance is a conversation — between the music, the audience, and the moment.

footer.description: Professional musician delivering unforgettable performances and studio excellence.
